question_en: My son is doing a Diploma in Mechanical. Are there jobs in Bhilai or NMDC in 2026?
question_hi_hinglish: Mera beta Mechanical Diploma kar raha hai. Kya 2026 mein Bhilai ya NMDC mein jobs hain?
answer_en: Yes! NMDC is actively hiring 'Junior Engineers (Mining)' on contract and regular basis in 2026. Bhilai Steel Plant and private firms like Vandana Ispat also need 'Maintenance Technicians.' Focus on learning CNC machine operations; it's the most demanded skill in the steel belt right now.
answer_hi_hinglish: Bilkul! 2026 mein NMDC 'Junior Engineer' ki bharti kar raha hai. Bhilai Steel Plant aur Vandana Ispat jaisi companies mein 'Maintenance' ki bahut jobs hain. Agar wo CNC machine chalana seekh le, toh Raipur-Bhilai area mein pakki naukri mil jayegi.

question_en: What is the PM-Vidyalaxmi scheme? Do I need to give my house as security for a loan?
question_hi_hinglish: PM-Vidyalaxmi scheme kya hai? Kya loan ke liye ghar girvi rakhna padega?
answer_en: Under the 2026 PM-Vidyalaxmi scheme, loans for top-tier colleges are **collateral-free** and guarantor-free. You don't need to pledge any property. It’s designed for meritorious students to study without financial stress. You can apply directly through the unified portal.
answer_hi_hinglish: PM-Vidyalaxmi 2026 ki aisi scheme hai jisme bade colleges ke liye loan bina kuch girvi rakhe (collateral-free) milta hai. Aapko ghar ya zameen ke kagaz nahi dene padenge. Ye sirf bacche ki mehnat aur admission par milta hai.

question_en: We live in Korba. Can my daughter get a job in the State Power Companies?
question_hi_hinglish: Hum Korba mein rehte hain. Kya meri beti ko state power companies mein job mil sakti hai?
answer_en: CSPDCL and CSPGCL regularly release 'Apprenticeship' notifications for Graduates and Diploma holders (Electrical/IT). In 2026, there are also openings for 'Assistant Engineers.' It's a stable government-backed career right in your hometown.
answer_hi_hinglish: CSPDCL aur CSPGCL (State Power Companies) har saal 'Apprenticeship' aur 'Assistant Engineer' ki bharti nikaalti hain. 2026 mein electrical aur IT walo ke liye kaafi jagah hai. Korba mein rehkar ye ek bahut hi sammanit aur stable job hai.

question_en: Is Agriculture just for farmers? My son has a B.Sc in Agriculture.
question_hi_hinglish: Kya Agriculture sirf kheti-baari ke liye hai? Mere bete ne B.Sc Agriculture kiya hai.
answer_en: In 2026, Chhattisgarh is running massive FAO-funded projects. Your son can work as a 'Block Facilitator' or 'Agronomy Expert' with salaries starting around ₹32k-40k. Companies like Ramnagar Seeds and Agromaxx also hire for 'Agri-Marketing' and 'Farm Management' roles in Raipur.
answer_hi_hinglish: Nahi, ab ye 'Agri-Business' ban chuka hai. 2026 mein CG mein 'Block Facilitator' aur 'Agronomy Expert' ki sarkari projects mein bharti ho rahi hai jahan ₹32k se ₹40k tak salary hai. Raipur ki badi seed companies mein 'Manager' ki jobs bhi bahut hain.

question_en: My family income is less than 4.5 lakhs. Do I get any discount on education loan interest?
question_hi_hinglish: Meri family income 4.5 lakh se kam hai. Kya mujhe education loan ke byaj (interest) mein chhoot milegi?
answer_en: Yes! If your income is below ₹4.5 lakhs, you get **100% interest subvention** during the study period. For families up to ₹8 lakhs, there is a 3% discount. This means the government pays the interest while your child is studying.
answer_hi_hinglish: Ji haan! Agar income 4.5 lakh se kam hai, toh padhai ke dauran pura byaj (interest) sarkar bharti hai. 8 lakh tak ki income walo ko 3% ki chhoot milti hai. Bacche ki padhai ke waqt aap par byaj ka bojh nahi padega.

question_en: What jobs are available in the Cement and Ferro Alloy plants near Janjgir-Champa?
question_hi_hinglish: Janjgir-Champa ke pass Cement aur Ferro Alloy plants mein kaunsi jobs milti hain?
answer_en: These plants need 'Quality Control Chemists' and 'Plant Operators.' If your child has a B.Sc in Chemistry or an ITI in Fitter trade, they are highly eligible. In 2026, there's a huge focus on 'Safety Officers' as well, which requires a short certification.
answer_hi_hinglish: In plants mein 'Quality Chemist' aur 'Plant Operator' ki sabse zyada demand hai. Agar bacche ne B.Sc Chemistry ya ITI kiya hai, toh wahan naukri milna asaan hai. 2026 mein 'Safety Officer' ka course karke bhi acchi salary wali job li ja sakti hai.

question_en: How do I apply for the PM-Vidyalaxmi loan? Do I have to visit the bank multiple times?
question_hi_hinglish: PM-Vidyalaxmi loan ke liye kaise apply karein? Kya baar-baar bank jana padega?
answer_en: The process is entirely digital in 2026. Register on the `pmvidyalaxmi.co.in` portal using Aadhaar. You can track your application online. Banks are required to process these applications through the portal, reducing the need for multiple physical visits.
answer_hi_hinglish: 2026 mein ye kaam online hota hai. `pmvidyalaxmi.co.in` website par Aadhaar se register karein. Aap ghar baithe mobile se dekh sakte hain ki loan kahan tak pahuncha. Bank ke chakkar kaatne ki zaroorat bahut kam ho gayi hai.

question_en: Is 'Horticulture' a good career for students in Durg?
question_hi_hinglish: Kya Durg ke students ke liye 'Horticulture' ek accha career hai?
answer_en: Yes, especially with the rise of agro-tourism and resorts in Chhattisgarh. Roles like 'Horticulture Supervisor' at places like Narayani Farms or AA Organics pay well. It's perfect for students who love nature and want a professional 'field job' rather than a desk job.
answer_hi_hinglish: Haan, Chhattisgarh mein naye resorts aur agro-tourism ke aane se 'Horticulture' mein bahut scope hai. Durg-Bhilai ke farms aur gardens mein 'Supervisor' ki acchi jobs hain. Jo bacche nature ke beech rehkar kaam karna chahte hain, unke liye ye best hai.
